title: Aerovolt Announces Electric Book & Claim at CJI London
content: During the Corporate Jet Investor conference in London this week (2nd-4th February 2026), Aerovolt has launched an Electric Book and Claim programme for business aviation, enabling operators to claim verified emissions reductions generated by electric flight activity. The scheme mirrors established SAF book and claim models, using real electric aircraft operations to create independently validated carbon certificates that can be allocated to conventional flights. The programme is designed to stimulate early demand for electric aviation, support investment in charging infrastructure and provide a practical pathway for operators to reduce reported emissions today. A live digital platform is now available that has early adopters of the programme enrolling into the scheme, with integrated tracking and reporting and further system integrations planned later this year.
author: Analysts Account
